Tip of the day
Quality outcome will help raise the chances for better quality items seen at the bottom of recipes in the crafting interface.

Underwater lotus

Other languages:
  • English
Underwater lotus
Type: Material
Value: 4
Fine Value: 24
Keywords: Ingredient
Plant
Properties:
Bankable:     Droppable:
Sellable:     Tradable:

A plant that's often mentioned in Syrenthian poetry. Known for its beauty and grace.

The Underwater lotus item is a material.

Contents

  • 1 Attributes (Input)
  • 2 Uses
    • 2.1 Recipe Ingredient
    • 2.2 Job Boards
    • 2.3 Activity Input
  • 3 Sources
    • 3.1 Activity Drops
    • 3.2 Shop Purchases
  • 4 Guides
  • 5 Gear Sets
  • 6 Related Items
  • 7 Trivia

Attributes (Input)

Quality Attributes

Global +40% Work efficiency
Global +200% Fine material finding
Global +10% Double rewards
Global +100% Bonus experience

Uses

Recipe Ingredient

Underwater lotus is an ingredient in the following recipe:

Item Name Service
Requirement 		Skills Materials
Used 		Recipe
Outputs
Prepare an underwater salad Needs Basic Kitchen service or better. Cooking lvl. 46 1x Sea cabbage
1x Sea spinach
1x Underwater lotus		 1x Underwater salad

Job Boards

Underwater lotus can be requested from the following job:

Job Board Name Location Quantity Item Type Reward
Vastalume job board Vastalume 16 +1  Syrenthia Faction Reputation

Activity Input

Underwater lotus is used as a required input for the following activity:

Activity Name Locations Requirement Note
Bird feeding Azurazera in Jarvonia
Frusenholm in Jarvonia		 Needs 1x Plant This activity gains extra benefits from using fine material inputs.

Sources

Activity Drops

Activity Name Skills Quantity Chance Odds Base
Rate 		W.E.A.R.‡
Merfolk farm foraging Foraging lvl. 40 1 13.333% ~1 in 8 actions 750 steps 398 steps

‡W.E.A.R is a value that shows the average steps for one item at maximum work efficiency.

Shop Purchases

Shop Name Location Region Item Type Stock Price
Pearl of the Sea Vastalume Syrenthia 1 10
Sunken Anchor Vastalume Syrenthia 1 10
